nasb.text: When the Lord your God gives it into your hand, you shall strike all the men in it with the edge of the sword.

esv.text: And when the Lord your God gives it into your hand, you shall put all its males to the sword,

cnv.text: 耶和華你的　神把城交在你手裡的時候，你要用利刃殺盡城裡所有的男丁。

ccb.text: 你们的上帝耶和华把城交给你们时，你们要杀光城里所有的男子，
